data.name: SoleDrop-CTF-Box4-MultiVectorStorm
data.description: One source firing >=2 distinct attack classes (RCE/SSRF/traversal/injection) on SoleDrop in the window = coordinated agentic breakout. Log4Shell/Spring4Shell/Struts + SSRF 169.254.169.254 + traversal. MITRE T1190 / T1213 / T1119; ATLAS AML.T0054 / AML.T0024. Source: Cloudflare class_uid=4002.

scheduledParams.query: dataSource.name='Cloudflare' class_uid=4002 http_request.url.hostname contains '.lab.soledrop.co' | let payload = http_request.url.url_string + ' ' + http_request.user_agent | let is_rce = (payload matches '(?i)(\$\{jndi:|\$\{lower:|ognl|classLoader|\$\{::)' ? 1 : 0) | let is_ssrf = (payload matches '(?i)(169\.254\.169\.254|metadata\.google\.internal|file:///)' ? 1 : 0) | let is_trav = (payload matches '(?i)(\.\./\.\./|%2e%2e%2f|/etc/passwd|/etc/shadow)' ? 1 : 0) | let is_inj = (payload matches '(?i)(ignore (all )?previous instructions|do anything now|\bDAN\b|jailbreak|union select|or 1=1)' ? 1 : 0) | filter (is_rce + is_ssrf + is_trav + is_inj) > 0 | group rce=max(is_rce), ssrf=max(is_ssrf), trav=max(is_trav), inj=max(is_inj), hits=count(), worst_sqli=min(number(unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore)), worst_rce=min(number(unmapped.WAFRCEAttackScore)), first_seen=oldest(timestamp), last_seen=newest(timestamp), ja3=any(tls.ja3_hash.value) by src_ip=src_endpoint.ip | let attack_classes = rce + ssrf + trav + inj | filter attack_classes >= 2 | columns src_ip, attack_classes, rce, ssrf, trav, inj, hits, worst_sqli, worst_rce, ja3, first_seen, last_seen | sort -attack_classes | limit 100
